name: skills-wiki
description: Open-source local AI skills manager for Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini

scripts.setup: npm run setup:python && npm run setup:node
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "MCP,Dashboard" -c "blue,green" "python main.py" "cd dashboard && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n "MCP,Dashboard" -c "blue,green" "python main.py" "cd dashboard && npm run build && npm start --prefix dashboard"
